_comment: Life-state variant: Heaven-Defying Beast (Enlightened). Generated from canonical species definition. Prime Directive: this state exists objectively; perception tier determines whether player recognizes it.
description: Achieved Dao comprehension, body radiates law; cultivates by contemplation

perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Sees a serene beast of heaven defying beast kind.
perception_tiers.core_formation: Recognizes species, life-state, and approximate cultivation.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Sees bloodline, mutation potential, and treasure affinity.
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Sees complete ecology and Dao-comprehension state.
